Footer.about_description: We are committed to providing the latest medical solutions and advanced equipment to elevate healthcare standards. Your trusted partner in the journey of wellness.

Hero.title: Quality Healthcare Begins Here
Hero.subtitle: We simplify access to safe and reliable medical supplies for every home and healthcare facility, adhering to the highest global standards.

AboutSummary.subtitle: Who We Are
AboutSummary.title: Your Trusted Reference for Medical Supplies
AboutSummary.description: We believe healthcare starts with quality. Our mission is to simplify access to certified medical supplies for individuals and healthcare facilities, adhering to the highest safety standards for a sustainable journey of wellness.

Services.subtitle: Our Services
Services.title: Integrated Medical Solutions
Services.description: We offer a comprehensive range of services to meet the healthcare sector needs, from supply to after-sales support.

items.equipment_desc: Providing the latest medical devices for ORs and ICUs.
items.supplies_desc: Supplying daily consumables and PPE at the best prices.
items.lab_desc: Precise laboratory tools ensuring reliable analysis results.
items.maintenance_desc: Specialized engineering team ensuring device efficiency 24/7.
items.logistics_desc: Strong distribution network covering all regions safely.
items.b2b_desc: Special offers and facilities for tenders and bulk orders.

FeaturedProducts.subtitle: Shop Online
FeaturedProducts.title: Everything You Need in One Place
FeaturedProducts.description: Browse our online store for the latest medical products with doorstep delivery.

WhyChooseUs.subtitle: Why Choose Us?
WhyChooseUs.title: Excellence in Medical Service
WhyChooseUs.description: We always strive to provide the best experience for our clients through strict quality standards.
WhyChooseUs.fast_delivery_desc: Safe and fast shipping to all regions of the Kingdom.
WhyChooseUs.support_desc: After-sales service and immediate maintenance for equipment.
WhyChooseUs.coverage_desc: A distribution network that reaches you wherever you are.

CTASection.title: Looking for a Trusted Medical Partner?
CTASection.description: We are here to help you choose the best equipment that fits your needs and budget. Let's start success together.

AboutUs.hero_subtitle: your partner in the journey of wellness
AboutUs.story_text_1: At Rahma Medical, we believe healthcare starts with providing reliable, safe, and accessible medical products for every home and facility.
AboutUs.story_text_2: We carefully select our products to meet the needs of individuals and healthcare facilities, ensuring a seamless buying experience.
AboutUs.vision_desc: To be the first choice and trusted reference for all medical solutions in the Kingdom.
AboutUs.mission_desc: Providing the latest medical technologies with fair prices and exceptional after-sales service.
AboutUs.values_desc: Our principles guide our decisions, and we adhere to them in every interaction.
AboutUs.goal_1_desc: Raising the quality standards of the local health sector with certified products.
AboutUs.goal_2_desc: To be the comprehensive choice for any medical facility by providing integrated services.
AboutUs.goal_3_desc: Delivering an ideal customer experience every time, from order to after-sales.
AboutUs.goal_4_desc: To be proactive in knowledge regarding the latest developments in medical technology.
AboutUs.cta_desc: Our team is ready to answer your inquiries and meet your needs with the highest quality standards.

Contact.hero_subtitle: We are here to help. Whether you have a product inquiry or want a partnership, our team is ready.
Contact.hero_cta: Enter your details and we will get back to you shortly.
Contact.info_subtitle: You can reach us via the following channels:
Contact.toast_success_desc: Thank you for contacting us, our team will reply shortly.
